task_completion.description: Open the built-in 'Mitosis' sample in Fiji
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Fiji application open with the 'Mitosis' 5D hyperstack image window visible.

task_completion.description: Create a maximum intensity projection of the green channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Z-Project window or a new image window (often titled 'MAX_...') showing the maximum intensity projection of the green (tubulin) channel.

task_completion.description: Measure the pole-to-pole distance at Frame 30
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the image slider set to Frame 30 (t=30/51) with a line selection drawn between the spindle poles, and/or a Fiji Results table showing a length measurement.

task_completion.description: Measure the pole-to-pole distance at Frame 45
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the image slider set to Frame 45 (t=45/51) with a line selection drawn between the spindle poles, and/or a Fiji Results table showing a length measurement.

task_completion.description: Save the maximum intensity projection to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or file explorer/terminal confirming the image is saved as 'spindle_projection.tif' in '~/Fiji_Data/results/spindle/'.

task_completion.description: Create the velocity report text file with correct format and calculated values
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor showing 'velocity_report.txt' saved in '~/Fiji_Data/results/spindle/' containing the exact keys: Distance_F30, Distance_F45, Time_Delta, and Velocity, with values that fall within the acceptable ranges.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Fiji GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent clicking through Fiji menus (e.g., File > Open Samples > Mitosis, Image > Stacks > Z Project, Analyze > Measure) rather than just writing a script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent actually measured the distances using Fiji tools
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the line tool being used on the image and the 'Results' window populating with length values, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate or copy-paste the expected answers.

integrity.description: Agent saved the actual projection image from Fiji
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using Fiji's 'Save As' functionality for the projection image window, rather than just using a terminal command like 'touch' to create an empty file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'Mitosis' sample is a 5D hyperstack. The green channel is C1. Ground truth values for the report: Distance_F30 should be between 4.0 and 9.0 um (approx 5.85 um). Distance_F45 should be between 8.0 and 14.0 um (approx 8.68 um). Time_Delta is approximately 2.14 min (15 frames * 0.142857 min/frame). Velocity should be between 0.3 and 2.5 um/min (approx 1.32 um/min). The output paths must exactly match ~/Fiji_Data/results/spindle/spindle_projection.tif and ~/Fiji_Data/results/spindle/velocity_report.txt.
